title: Greek Salad with Creamy Dressing
description: A classic Greek salad with a twist of creamy dressing. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch.

ingredients.name: Greek salad mix
ingredients.notes: any mix of lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, red onions

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a light hand as the yogurt provides creaminess

ingredients.name: Red wine vinegar
ingredients.notes: or apple cider vinegar for a sweeter flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: use a gentle hand as the feta will add saltiness

ingredients.name: Feta cheese (optional)
ingredients.notes: for an extra burst of flavor

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the Greek salad mix, sliced long beans, and crumbled feta cheese (if using)
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the creamy Greek yogurt, olive oil, red wine vinegar, and salt
3. Pour the yogurt dressing over the salad and toss to combine
4. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed
